tests.description: Three-layer LLM/tool nesting with interrupt at the deepest layer. Tests that runPrompt's message-thread alias survives a resume even when the resumed runPrompt is an inner one (i.e., its shared thread is a per-tool-branch thread, not the global node thread).

evaluationCriteria.judgePrompt: The output should be the string 'inner-ok' (with or without quotes; case-insensitive). Pass if the output contains 'inner-ok'.
